benchmark_report.title: 🔬 SAVAGE COMMAND BENCHMARKER: Scientific Analysis Report
benchmark_report.subtitle: Your commands have been scientifically roasted
benchmark_report.methodology: Statistical analysis based on CLAUDE.md complexity rules and empirical measurements

premature_abstraction.evidence: All commands over-engineered for simple tasks

configuration_hell.evidence: 109 and 97 template variables in single files

meta_complexity.evidence: adaptive-complexity-router: complex system to manage complexity

savage_commentary.overall_verdict: EPIC FAILURE: 100% of commands violate basic simplicity principles
key_findings: Average command is 19.3x larger than maximum recommended function size
Complexity scores average 160% above acceptable limits
Commands solving problems that don't exist
Template variable count suggests configuration nightmare
MCP dependency usage indicates external complexity addiction

specific_roasts.adhd-context-switch.md: 398 lines for task switching? That's not 'seamless', that's a bureaucratic nightmare with worse overhead than government paperwork.
specific_roasts.adhd-hyperfocus-guardian.md: 456 lines to 'guard' hyperfocus? The irony is that reading this command would break anyone's hyperfocus permanently.
specific_roasts.adhd-morning-assistant.md: 308 lines for morning planning? By the time you finish reading this, it's afternoon. Also, 7 MCP calls for morning planning? That's not assistance, that's dependency hell with a friendly name.
specific_roasts.adaptive-complexity-router.md: 498 lines to route complexity? This IS the complexity! You've created the most complex solution to manage complexity. That's like hiring a bureaucrat to reduce bureaucracy.
specific_roasts.analyze-project-architecture.md: 273 lines is actually the 'smallest' failure here, but still 13.6x larger than it should be. Congratulations on being the least terrible of the terrible.

immediate_actions: Apply the 3-Question Rule from CLAUDE.md before writing ANY code
Replace template variables with direct implementations
Break large commands into focused, single-purpose tools
architectural_changes: Implement complexity scoring for new commands
cultural_changes: Celebrate simple solutions over complex ones

success_metrics.roi_calculation: Negative infinity - infinite complexity for finite value

statistical_confidence.pattern_consistency: EXTREMELY HIGH - 100% failure rate across all samples
statistical_confidence.extrapolation_confidence: 95% - expect similar failures across entire command directory

what_this_teaches: Complexity is the enemy of usability
Template variables are not necessarily good abstraction
Meta-solutions often create more problems than they solve
Size matters - bigger is NOT better
